scenes.title: Intro Hook
scenes.voiceover: Welcome to today's market update, where we'll be discussing the ongoing bearish trend in the market.
scenes.caption: Market Update: Bearish Trend

scenes.title: Market Summary
scenes.visual: Split-screen with index and sector performance
scenes.voiceover: The market trend is bearish, with the Sensex closing at 73583.22, down by 2.25, and the Nifty 50 closing at 22819.6, down by 2.09.
scenes.caption: Market Summary: Bearish Trend

scenes.title: Major Index Performance
scenes.visual: Bar chart with major index performance
scenes.voiceover: The major indices are all down, with the Sensex closing at 73583.22, down by 2.25, the Nifty 50 closing at 22819.6, down by 2.09, and the Nifty 100 closing at 23400.05, down by 2.15.
scenes.caption: Major Index Performance: Down

scenes.title: Sector Winners
scenes.voiceover: Unfortunately, there are no sector winners today, as all sectors are down.
scenes.caption: Sector Winners: None

scenes.title: Sector Losers
scenes.voiceover: The top sector losers are Realty, down by 3.17, Auto, down by 2.82, and Infra, down by 1.88.
scenes.caption: Sector Losers: Realty, Auto, Infra

scenes.title: Race Chart
scenes.visual: Line chart with India VIX performance
scenes.voiceover: The India VIX is up by 8.77, indicating increased volatility in the market.
scenes.caption: India VIX: Up

scenes.title: Closing Summary
scenes.visual: Split-screen with index and sector performance
scenes.voiceover: In conclusion, the market trend is bearish, with all major indices and sectors down. We'll be back with more updates tomorrow.
scenes.caption: Closing Summary: Bearish Trend
